_status_note: verified_in_runner = 'draft.lang' confirmed in source (static check). The actual language output requires live Claude API testing to verify. This is the weakest verification of the ten cases.
title: Language consistency: English booking conversation must produce English confirmation
failing_behavior: When an English-speaking customer booked, the final confirmation was sometimes in Vietnamese ('Lịch hẹn...đã được xác nhận'). biz._bookingState was cleared before _submitDirectBooking, causing lang to fall back to Vietnamese default.
root_cause: Old EscalationEngine.create() path read biz._bookingState.lang AFTER state was cleared at line ~2171. State cleared → lang=null → fell back to biz default language (sometimes 'vi'). Fixed by switching to _submitDirectBooking which captures draft.lang before state clear.

conversation.content: I'd like a gel manicure with Tracy on Monday at 2pm

notes: _submitDirectBooking captures lang from BOOKING draft before state is cleared. The verify_fix_string 'draft.lang' is common in the file — upgrade this to a more specific string if this test starts giving false positives.
